title: KubaKku's Backslot Datapack
body:
# A datapack that lets you put items on your back

## New Enchantment!
> This datapack adds a new enchantment **Backslot** to minecraft

> This new enchantment is **exclusive to chestplates**

> When you're wearing a chestplate with Backslot on it, you can put your items on your back. To do that **press _Crouch_ and _Swap Items_**

## Important!
### _This datapack may not work with other datapacks_
